channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Juan Soto could decide on his next team before or during baseball's winter meetings
item.description: Juan Soto appears on a timetable to decide on where to sign either before or during baseball’s winter meetings in Dallas, which run from Dec. 8-12.
item.dc:creator: Ronald Blum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Expanded Big Ten could put 4 teams in the playoff -- thanks to Indiana's unexpected rise
item.description: The expanded Big Ten is poised to be a major player in this season's College Football Playoff. The 18-team conference had three of the top-four teams in the AP poll this week — No. 1 Oregon, No. 2 Ohio State and No. 4 Penn State.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NBA says Hawks violated player participation policy by sitting Trae Young for Cup game
item.description: The NBA fined the Atlanta Hawks $100,000 on Tuesday after an investigation determined that guard Trae Young could have played in an NBA Cup game against the Boston Celtics on Nov. 12. The Hawks listed Young on their injury report that night as out because of tendinitis in his right Achilles.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nuggets' Michael Malone questions team's effort after blowout loss to Knicks
item.description: Denver Nuggets head coach Michael Malone torched his own team on Monday night after their 145-118 against the New York Knicks on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Rams WR Demarcus Robinson arrested on suspicion of DUI after loss to Eagles
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Los Angeles Rams receiver Demarcus Robinson was arrested on suspicion of driving under the influence early Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Whittingham uncertain about future at Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - This has been the most disappointing and most frustrating season in Kyle Whittingham's 20 years as head coach of the Utah football team. But will Whittingham be back for a 21st season? He has a decision to make in the coming weeks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lobos linemen purchase turkeys for families in need with NIL funds
item.description: Some of the players know how hard it can be to put food on the table, so they wanted to extend a hand up.
item.dc:creator: Melissa Torres, NewsNation

item.title: Toronto holds off Utah HC, 3-2
item.description: TORONTO (AP) - Mitch Marner scored twice in a second-period surge as the Toronto Maple Leafs defeated the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 on Sunday night to extend their winning streak to four. The victory, in the lone NHL game on the schedule, came in the first meeting between Toronto and Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Injured Joel Embiid, Paul George watch from the 76ers' bench once again
item.description: James Harden was about booed out of the arena each time he touched the ball, a sound of contempt not heard in Philly since — well, since Ben Simmons was razzed with much the same vocal voraciousness two nights earlier.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: USF football rolls to bowl eligibility for 2nd straight year with 63-30 dismantling of Tulsa
item.description: South Florida (6-5; 4-3 American) earned the program’s 12th bowl appearance in 24 seasons of play at the FBS level, posting 715 yards of offense in a 63-30 domination of Tulsa (3-8; 1-6 American) Saturday on Senior Day in Raymond James Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Brian Siegrist, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah HC busts out of offensive slump with 6-1 victory
item.description: PITTSBURGH (ABC4 Sports) - After getting shut out for the fifth time of the season, the Utah Hockey team scored a regulation-time season-high six goals in a 6-1 rout over the Pittsburgh Penguins Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Florida knocks No. 9 Ole Miss out of College Football Playoff contention, 24-17 in the Swamp
item.description: Coach Billy Napier and his team did something no one at Florida had done in nearly two decades. It could be the turning point for a once-proud program that clearly slipped in recent years.
item.dc:creator: MARK LONG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Chargers' Week 16 matchup becomes first ever NFL game flexed to a Thursday. Some fans aren't happy
item.description: The Los Angeles Chargers are surging at the moment, and the NFL is beginning to take notice. For the first time ever, the NFL has moved a game up three days from Sunday to a Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Montrose football aims to earn spot in 4A final four
item.description: The only Western Slope high school football team still alive and still fighting for a title is the 11-0 Montrose Red Hawks, the 2-seed in 4A.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Bidding war set to begin for star right fielder Juan Soto
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- After meeting with Juan Soto, Yankees managing general partner Hal Steinbrenner is unsure of their chances of resigning the star right fielder. Steinbrenner added that it was a very honest back and forth and that it lasted a couple of hours.
item.dc:creator: Marc Malusis, PIX 11

item.title: Alex Killorn helps the Ducks beat the Blackhawks 3-2 for their third straight win
item.description: Alex Killorn had a goal and an assist in the third period, and the Anaheim Ducks beat the Chicago Blackhawks 3-2 on Tuesday night for their season-high third straight win.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
